sections.paragraph:
verb טמא

be contaminated, unclean, defiled

verb לטמא

to contaminate, defile, profane

verb טומא

be defiled

verb להתטמא

to defile oneself, become unclean, become impure

verb הוטמא

be defiled, become unclean, become impure

verb לטמא (>>טימא)

to contaminate, defile, profane

adjective

not pure, uncleanly, impure, uncleaned; forbidden for eating, untouchable; defiled
